news.description: Oil is set for a fourth straight weekly loss as the Strait of Hormuz reopens and Saudi Arabia ramps up crude exports to Asia.

news.title: UAE Rewrites Offshore Oil Pricing To Capture Asian Markets
news.description: No longer restricted by OPEC caps and launching a major post-quota production increase, the UAE is aligning its pricing strategy to compete effectively for long-term Asian spot market share.
